---
title: "Entropy Exploration"
subtitle: "CSAS 2026"
author: "Naren Prakash"
format:
  html:
    page-width: 90%
    fig-width: 14
    fig-height: 8
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(DataExplorer)
library(implied)
library(janitor)
library(brms)
```
```{r}
matchweeks <- read_csv("../../data/raw/matchweeks.csv")
set.seed(24)
```


```{r}
# Calculate Shannon entropy for each match
# H_i = -sum(p_k * log_3(p_k)) for k in {w, d, l}
calculate_entropy <- function(p_win, p_draw, p_loss) {
  # Handle zero probabilities to avoid log(0)
  probs <- c(p_win, p_draw, p_loss)
  probs <- probs[probs > 0]  # Remove zero probabilities
  if (length(probs) == 0) return(0)
  -sum(probs * log(probs, base = 3))
}

# Vectorized entropy calculation
calc_entropy_vectorized <- function(p_win, p_draw, p_loss) {
  entropy <- rep(0, length(p_win))
  
  # For home team matches
  h_mask <- !is.na(p_win) & !is.na(p_draw) & !is.na(p_loss)
  pw <- p_win[h_mask]
  pd <- p_draw[h_mask]
  pl <- p_loss[h_mask]
  
  ent <- rep(0, sum(h_mask))
  if (pw > 0) ent <- ent - pw * log(pw, base = 3)
  if (pd > 0) ent <- ent - pd * log(pd, base = 3)
  if (pl > 0) ent <- ent - pl * log(pl, base = 3)
  
  entropy[h_mask] <- ent
  return(entropy)
}

# Filter for 2004 season
matchweeks_2004 <- matchweeks %>% 
  filter(season == 2004)

# Calculate entropy for each match
matchweeks_2004 <- matchweeks_2004 %>%
  mutate(
    entropy = -((b365h * log(b365h, base = 3)) + 
                  (b365d * log(b365d, base = 3)) + 
                  (b365a * log(b365a, base = 3)))
  )

# Create team-level entropy data (both home and away appearances)
home_entropy <- matchweeks_2004 %>%
  select(team = home_team, matchweek, entropy) %>%
  mutate(venue = "Home")

away_entropy <- matchweeks_2004 %>%
  select(team = away_team, matchweek, entropy) %>%
  mutate(venue = "Away")

# Combine home and away
team_entropy <- bind_rows(home_entropy, away_entropy) %>%
  arrange(team, matchweek)

# Plot entropy for each team across matchweeks (subset for clarity)
# Show teams in batches to avoid overcrowding
unique_teams <- sort(unique(team_entropy$team))
n_teams <- length(unique_teams)

# Split into 2 groups for visibility
team_groups <- list(
  team_entropy %>% filter(team %in% unique_teams[1:10]),
  team_entropy %>% filter(team %in% unique_teams[11:n_teams])
)

for (i in seq_along(team_groups)) {
  p <- ggplot(team_groups[[i]], aes(x = matchweek, y = entropy, group = team, color = team)) +
    geom_line(alpha = 0.8, linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
    scale_color_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Match Uncertainty (Shannon Entropy) - 2004 Season (Group ", i, ")"),
      subtitle = "Entropy calculated from Bet365 bookmaker probabilities",
      x = "Matchweek",
      y = "Shannon Entropy (base 3)",
      color = "Team",
      caption = "Higher entropy = more uncertain match outcomes"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  print(p)
}
```

```{r}
# Alternative: Aggregate entropy by team (mean per matchweek)
team_entropy_summary <- team_entropy %>%
  group_by(team, matchweek) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_entropy = mean(entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Plot with facets - spread into 4 columns for better visibility
ggplot(team_entropy_summary, aes(x = matchweek, y = mean_entropy)) +
  geom_line(color = "#2C3E50", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "#E74C3C", size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~team, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Match Uncertainty by Team - 2004 Season",
    subtitle = "Mean Shannon entropy per matchweek for each team",
    x = "Matchweek",
    y = "Mean Shannon Entropy",
    caption = "Higher entropy = more uncertain match outcomes"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12)
  )
```

```{r, fig.height=10}
# Team season-level average entropy
team_season_avg <- team_entropy %>%
  group_by(team) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_entropy = mean(entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
    matches = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_entropy))

# Bar plot of average entropy by team - larger for visibility
ggplot(team_season_avg, aes(x = reorder(team, avg_entropy), y = avg_entropy)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = avg_entropy), show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Average Match Uncertainty by Team - 2004 Season",
    subtitle = "Season-long average Shannon entropy",
    x = "Team",
    y = "Average Shannon Entropy",
    caption = "Higher entropy = more uncertain matches on average"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )
```

```{r, fig.height=8}
# Calculate end-of-season standings from match results
# For each match, compute points: Win=3, Draw=1, Loss=0
# Use goal difference as tiebreaker

# Load seasonal data for goals
seasonal_2004 <- read_csv("../../data/raw/seasonal/Season02004.csv")

# Compute standings with goals
# Home team results
home_results <- seasonal_2004 %>%
  select(team = HomeTeam, FTHG, FTAG, FTR) %>%
  mutate(
    points = case_when(
      FTR == "H" ~ 3,
      FTR == "D" ~ 1,
      FTR == "A" ~ 0
    ),
    goal_diff = FTHG - FTAG
  ) %>%
  select(team, points, goal_diff)

# Away team results
away_results <- seasonal_2004 %>%
  select(team = AwayTeam, FTHG, FTAG, FTR) %>%
  mutate(
    points = case_when(
      FTR == "A" ~ 3,
      FTR == "D" ~ 1,
      FTR == "H" ~ 0
    ),
    goal_diff = FTAG - FTHG
  ) %>%
  select(team, points, goal_diff)

# Combine and compute final standings
final_standings <- bind_rows(home_results, away_results) %>%
  group_by(team) %>%
  summarise(
    final_points = sum(points),
    goal_difference = sum(goal_diff),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  # Rank by points first, then goal difference as tiebreaker
  arrange(desc(final_points), desc(goal_difference)) %>%
  mutate(
    final_position = row_number()
  )

# Merge with entropy data
team_entropy_summary <- team_entropy %>%
  group_by(team) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_entropy = mean(entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

final_standings <- final_standings %>%
  left_join(team_entropy_summary, by = "team")

print("Final League Table - 2004 Season:")
print(final_standings %>% 
  select(Position = final_position, Team = team, Points = final_points, GD = goal_difference, Avg_Entropy = avg_entropy) %>%
  arrange(Position))
```

```{r, fig.height=7}
# Empirical histogram of match-level entropy values (2004 season)
ggplot(matchweeks_2004, aes(x = entropy)) +
  geom_histogram(
    aes(y = after_stat(density)),
    bins = 30,
    fill = "#2C3E50",
    color = "white",
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_density(color = "#E74C3C", linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(
    aes(xintercept = mean(entropy), color = "Mean"),
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "", values = c("Mean" = "#E67E22")) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Match-Level Entropy - 2004 Season",
    subtitle = paste0("n = ", nrow(matchweeks_2004), " matches"),
    x = "Shannon Entropy (base 3)",
    y = "Density",
    caption = "Higher entropy = more uncertain match outcomes"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```

```{r, fig.height=8}
# Scatter plot: Average Entropy vs Final Position
ggplot(final_standings, aes(x = final_position, y = avg_entropy, label = team)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = final_points, color = avg_entropy), alpha = 0.8, stroke = 1.5) +
  geom_text(vjust = -0.8, hjust = 0.5, size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma") +
  scale_size(range = c(3, 8), name = "Final Points") +
  scale_x_reverse(breaks = 1:20) +
  labs(
    title = "Entropy vs Final League Position - 2004 Season",
    subtitle = "Position determined by total points; color shows average match uncertainty",
    x = "Final League Position (1 = Champion)",
    y = "Average Shannon Entropy",
    caption = "Top-left: High-performing teams with predictable matches | Bottom-right: Low-performing teams with uncertain matches"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r, fig.height=8}
# Scatter plot: Average Entropy vs Final Points (more direct relationship)
ggplot(final_standings, aes(x = avg_entropy, y = final_points, label = team)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = final_position), size = 4, alpha = 0.8, stroke = 1.5) +
  geom_text(vjust = -0.8, hjust = 0.5, size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", direction = -1, name = "Final Position") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "#2C3E50", linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Match Uncertainty vs Season Performance - 2004 Season",
    subtitle = "Does higher entropy correlate with lower points?",
    x = "Average Shannon Entropy",
    y = "Final Season Points",
    caption = "Dashed line: Linear trend"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r, fig.height=10}
# Rolling cumulative points vs cumulative entropy over matchweeks (for top 6 teams)
# Need to compute cumulative standings with goals from seasonal data

# Join matchweeks with seasonal data to get goals per match
matchweeks_goals <- matchweeks_2004 %>%
  select(date, home_team, away_team, matchweek) %>%
  left_join(
    seasonal_2004 %>% 
      mutate(Date = as.Date(Date, format = "%d/%m/%y")) %>%
      select(Date, HomeTeam, AwayTeam, FTHG, FTAG),
    by = join_by(date == Date, home_team == HomeTeam, away_team == AwayTeam)
  )

# Compute cumulative results per matchweek
home_cum <- matchweeks_goals %>%
  select(team = home_team, matchweek, FTHG, FTAG) %>%
  mutate(
    points = case_when(FTHG > FTAG ~ 3, FTHG == FTAG ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0),
    gd = FTHG - FTAG
  )

away_cum <- matchweeks_goals %>%
  select(team = away_team, matchweek, FTHG, FTAG) %>%
  mutate(
    points = case_when(FTAG > FTHG ~ 3, FTAG == FTHG ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0),
    gd = FTAG - FTHG
  )

all_results <- bind_rows(home_cum, away_cum) %>%
  arrange(team, matchweek) %>%
  group_by(team) %>%
  mutate(
    cumulative_points = cumsum(points),
    cumulative_gd = cumsum(gd)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Add entropy to all_results
all_results <- all_results %>%
  left_join(
    team_entropy %>% select(team, matchweek, entropy),
    by = c("team", "matchweek")
  ) %>%
  group_by(team) %>%
  mutate(cumulative_entropy = cumsum(entropy)) %>%
  ungroup()

top_6_teams <- final_standings %>%
  arrange(final_position) %>%
  slice(1:6) %>%
  pull(team)

rolling_plot <- all_results %>%
  filter(team %in% top_6_teams) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = matchweek)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = cumulative_points, color = team, group = team), linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = cumulative_points, color = team), size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative Season Points - Top 6 Teams (2004 Season)",
    x = "Matchweek",
    y = "Cumulative Points",
    color = "Team"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(rolling_plot)

# Same for entropy
entropy_rolling <- all_results %>%
  filter(team %in% top_6_teams) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = matchweek, y = cumulative_entropy, color = team, group = team)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative Entropy - Top 6 Teams (2004 Season)",
    x = "Matchweek",
    y = "Cumulative Shannon Entropy",
    color = "Team"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(entropy_rolling)

# Bottom 6 teams cumulative points
bottom_6_teams <- final_standings %>%
  arrange(desc(final_position)) %>%
  slice(1:6) %>%
  pull(team)

bottom_rolling_plot <- all_results %>%
  filter(team %in% bottom_6_teams) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = matchweek)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = cumulative_points, color = team, group = team), linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = cumulative_points, color = team), size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "magma") +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative Season Points - Bottom 6 Teams (2004 Season)",
    x = "Matchweek",
    y = "Cumulative Points",
    color = "Team"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(bottom_rolling_plot)

# Bottom 6 teams cumulative entropy
bottom_entropy_rolling <- all_results %>%
  filter(team %in% bottom_6_teams) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = matchweek, y = cumulative_entropy, color = team, group = team)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "magma") +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative Entropy - Bottom 6 Teams (2004 Season)",
    x = "Matchweek",
    y = "Cumulative Shannon Entropy",
    color = "Team"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(bottom_entropy_rolling)
```

# Entropy Features for Relegation Modeling

```{r, fig.height=8}
# Compute per-team entropy features: mean and variance
team_entropy_features <- team_entropy %>%
  group_by(team) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_entropy = mean(entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
    var_entropy = var(entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_entropy = sd(entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
    matches = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    final_standings %>% select(team, final_position, final_points, goal_difference),
    by = "team"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    relegated = final_position >= 18,
    relegation_label = case_when(
      final_position <= 3 ~ "Champions League",
      final_position <= 6 ~ "Europa League",
      final_position <= 17 ~ "Mid-table",
      TRUE ~ "Relegation Zone"
    ),
    relegation_label = factor(relegation_label, levels = c("Champions League", "Europa League", "Mid-table", "Relegation Zone"))
  )

print(team_entropy_features %>% select(team, mean_entropy, var_entropy, final_position, relegated))
```

```{r, fig.height=8}
# Mean entropy vs variance, colored by final position
ggplot(team_entropy_features, aes(x = mean_entropy, y = var_entropy, label = team)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = relegation_label, size = final_points), alpha = 0.8, stroke = 1.5) +
  geom_text(vjust = -0.8, hjust = 0.5, size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Zone", values = c(
    "Champions League" = "#27AE60",
    "Europa League" = "#2ECC71",
    "Mid-table" = "#3498DB",
    "Relegation Zone" = "#E74C3C"
  )) +
  scale_size(range = c(3, 8), name = "Final Points") +
  labs(
    title = "Entropy Mean-Variance Profile - 2004 Season",
    subtitle = "Relegation candidates cluster by their uncertainty signature",
    x = "Mean Shannon Entropy (match uncertainty)",
    y = "Variance of Entropy (consistency)",
    caption = "High mean + high variance = unpredictable, volatile season"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```

```{r, fig.height=7}
# Compare entropy features for relegated vs non-relegated
relegation_comparison <- team_entropy_features %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(mean_entropy, var_entropy, sd_entropy),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    metric = case_when(
      metric == "mean_entropy" ~ "Mean",
      metric == "var_entropy" ~ "Variance",
      metric == "sd_entropy" ~ "Std Dev"
    )
  )

ggplot(relegation_comparison, aes(x = relegated, y = value, fill = relegated)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "", values = c("TRUE" = "#E74C3C", "FALSE" = "#3498DB"),
                    labels = c("Relegated", "Safe")) +
  labs(
    title = "Entropy Features: Relegated vs Safe Teams",
    x = "Relegation Status",
    y = "Value",
    caption = "2004 Season — 3 teams relegated (positions 18-20)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11)
  )
```

```{r, fig.height=8}
# Lollipop: rank teams by entropy variance
ggplot(team_entropy_features %>% arrange(desc(var_entropy)),
       aes(x = reorder(team, var_entropy), y = var_entropy, fill = relegation_label)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(color = relegation_label), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Zone", values = c(
    "Champions League" = "#27AE60",
    "Europa League" = "#2ECC71",
    "Mid-table" = "#3498DB",
    "Relegation Zone" = "#E74C3C"
  )) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Zone", values = c(
    "Champions League" = "#1E8449",
    "Europa League" = "#196F3D",
    "Mid-table" = "#21618C",
    "Relegation Zone" = "#C0392B"
  )) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Teams Ranked by Entropy Variance - 2004 Season",
    subtitle = "Higher variance = more inconsistent match uncertainty",
    x = "Team",
    y = "Entropy Variance"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```
